document_text:
SafeProtocol Whitepaper v1.0

Abstract
SafeProtocol is a decentralized lending protocol built on Solana. Our goal is to provide a highly capital-efficient money market for long-tail assets.

Tokenomics
The native token is $SAFE. The total supply is capped at 1,000,000,000 tokens.
- 40% allocated to community incentives.
- 20% allocated to the core team (vested over 4 years).
- 20% to investors.
- 20% for initial liquidity (locked for 12 months).

Security & Audits
The protocol's smart contracts have been fully audited by TopTier Security Firm. The code is open source and available on our GitHub. The protocol is governed by a DAO and controlled via a 5-of-9 multisignature wallet. There is no admin key that can arbitrarily pause the protocol or mint new tokens.

Risks & Vulnerabilities
During the audit, a medium-severity centralization risk was identified regarding the oracle price feeds. This has been mitigated by integrating a decentralized oracle network (Pyth). No reentrancy or flash loan vulnerabilities were found.
